dateTime:
// Uses Java 8+ java.time API (standard on modern JVMs/Android)
// Ensure project dependencies allow java.time if not on a recent platform.
import java.time.*
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
import java.time.temporal.ChronoField
import java.util.Locale // For locale-specific formatting

fun main() {
    println("--- Current Date and Time (using java.time) ---")
    val now = LocalDateTime.now() // Local date/time without timezone info
    val zonedNow = ZonedDateTime.now() // Local date/time with system default timezone
    val utcNow = Instant.now() // Represents a point on the UTC timeline

    println("LocalDateTime: ${now}")
    println("ZonedDateTime: ${zonedNow}")
    println("Instant (UTC): ${utcNow}")

    println("\n--- Common Formats (using DateTimeFormatter) ---")
    println("ISO Local Date Time: ${now.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)}")
    println("ISO Zoned Date Time: ${zonedNow.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_ZONED_DATE_TIME)}")
    println("RFC 1123: ${zonedNow.format(DateTimeFormatter.RFC_1123_DATE_TIME)}")

    println("\n--- Custom Formats ---")
    val customFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    println("Custom ('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'): ${now.format(customFormatter)}")
    // Use Locale for month/day names etc.
    val readableFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy 'at' hh:mm:ss a zzzz", Locale.ENGLISH)
    println("Readable (English): ${zonedNow.format(readableFormatter)}")

    println("\n--- Components (using java.time accessors) ---")
    println("Year: ${now.year}")
    println("Month: ${now.monthValue} (${now.month})") // numeric & enum
    println("Day: ${now.dayOfMonth}")
    println("Hour: ${now.hour}")
    println("Minute: ${now.minute}")
    println("Second: ${now.second}")
    println("NanoSecond: ${now.nano}")
    println("DayOfWeek: ${now.dayOfWeek}") // Enum MONDAY etc.
    println("DayOfYear: ${now.dayOfYear}")

    println("\n--- Unix Epoch Seconds ---")
    val epochSeconds = utcNow.epochSecond // From Instant
    // val epochSecondsFromZoned = zonedNow.toEpochSecond()
    println("Seconds since epoch (UTC): ${epochSeconds}")
    val epochMillis = utcNow.toEpochMilli()
    println("Milliseconds since epoch (UTC): ${epochMillis}")
}
